overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a futuristic neon-lit urban downtown. The character moves from a narrow construction alley through busy streets with towering skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and street-level commercial activity under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow construction alley with debris and barriers

events.description: exits narrow construction alley into open urban street under bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: moving through narrow debris-filled alley toward the open street ahead

entered.detail: multi-story dilapidated building with exposed balconies and broken windows
orange and white striped plastic barriers blocking off construction zones
large piles of garbage bags and construction debris stacked along the path
metal pedestrian bridge connecting two buildings above the alley

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow, shadowed construction alley filled with debris piles and barriers. The player moves forward through the confined space, passing under a damaged concrete building with an overhead walkway bridge visible ahead, before emerging into brighter open street at the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: turns left at intersection to proceed along street under the overpass

agents.ego_description: navigating under the concrete overpass and executing a left turn at the intersection

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving past the intersection on the cross street

entered.detail: massive elevated highway structure casting deep shadows over the street
corner convenience store with glowing green circular logo signage
red and white striped barriers marking road construction zones
high-rise structure covered in large digital advertisements

segments.scene_description: Moving under the massive concrete overpass, the scene shifts to a darker, semi-covered urban intersection. The player turns left past the Cali Express convenience store with its distinctive green signage, while traffic barriers line the left side and a tall billboard-covered building rises in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: broad downtown avenue lined with skyscrapers and billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the sunlit city street past towering advertisements and construction walls

entered.detail: massive vertical orange advertisement displaying food products and promotional text
teal-colored temporary wall with murals and graffiti covering building construction
dense collection of futuristic glass and steel high-rise buildings dominating the skyline

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide, sunlit downtown avenue with full sky visibility. The player walks along the sidewalk passing the iconic All Foods mega-billboard on the left and a long green construction wall with street art on the right, while futuristic skyscrapers tower ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with food kiosks and digital displays

events.description: enters bustling commercial plaza area with increased pedestrian activity and food vendors

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza past food kiosks and browsing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive hairstyle and cybernetic implants walking toward camera

entered.detail: colorful food vendor stalls with awnings and signage in the open plaza area
large floating digital billboard displaying animated colorful imagery above the street
storefront signage with neon lettering indicating a pawn shop business
row of automated vendor machines along the plaza edge

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a vibrant open plaza with paved tile ground and moderate crowds. The player walks past colorful food kiosks and vending machines while a large holographic advertisement floats above the street ahead, and pedestrians browse the commercial area.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with close building facades and street-level details

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk with other pedestrians toward a distant smoke plume visible between buildings

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: building exterior painted in deep red with architectural details and window units
clusters of air conditioning units mounted on the building exterior walls
wall surface covered in colorful spray-painted tags and street art
white smoke rising into the sky visible between the downtown skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a medium-width sidewalk with close building facades, including a distinctive red building with external AC units and graffiti-covered walls. The player walks with the flow of pedestrians toward a distant smoke plume visible between the towering skyscrapers ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, shadowed alleyway into the expansive, sun-drenched heart of a futuristic downtown. It begins by pushing through a narrow construction zone filled with debris and barriers, passing beneath a damaged concrete building and an overhead walkway. As the camera emerges from the confined space, the scene shifts into a semi-covered urban intersection where the player turns left past the green signage of a Cali Express store and towering billboard-covered buildings. The environment then opens completely into a wide, bright avenue under a clear sky, moving past a massive All Foods billboard and a long, art-covered construction wall. Finally, the perspective extends toward a horizon of towering skyscrapers that dominate the sunlit city skyline.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, open commercial plaza into a denser urban corridor flanked by towering skyscrapers. It begins by gliding across paved tiles through a bustling square, passing colorful food kiosks and vending machines while a massive holographic advertisement floats overhead. As the camera moves forward, the wide-open space narrows into a medium-width sidewalk where the environment shifts toward a more gritty aesthetic. The scene then transitions past close building facades, including a red structure marked by external AC units and graffiti-covered walls, while following the flow of pedestrians. Finally, the perspective pushes deeper into the city, tracking toward a distant plume of smoke visible between the monolithic buildings ahead.
